concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Charlie Haden's Liberation Music Orchestra/Philly Joe Jones' Dameronia

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: me and Martin Banks. So, we all go down to the beach... Martin Banks, he’s the trumpet player... Martin Banks chops were tired
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: I had Martin Banks, Virgil Jones, and Johnny Coles on trumpets.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: He played on No, You’d Better Not, and also Martin Banks, the trumpet player, played a trumpet solo on that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
